member.name: T:jjm.one.Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Helpers.FunctionLogging
member.summary: Static class for all function logging helper extensions.

member.name: M:jjm.one.Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Helpers.FunctionLogging.LogFctCall(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LogLevel,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Log a function/method call. The class and method names are resolved at compile time via caller-info attributes — zero allocation, no stack walk.

member.name: M:jjm.one.Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Helpers.FunctionLogging.LogExcInFctCall(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.Exception,System.String,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LogLevel,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Log an exception within a function/method call. The class and method names are resolved at compile time via caller-info attributes — zero allocation, no stack walk.
member.param: An optional context message appended to the log entry.

member.name: M:jjm.one.Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Helpers.FunctionLogging.LogExcInFctCall(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.Exception,System.Type,System.Reflection.MethodBase,System.String,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LogLevel)
member.summary: Log an exception within a function/method call.
member.param: An optional context message appended to the log entry.
